title: Questions (the Apple Notes mega-junk-drawer 2024-2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • A 700-line Apple Note that started 2024-07-04 as a metaphysics journal ("why are we here?", world religions in two-line caricature) and got hijacked into a china chapter / Grants Pass / Austin master TODO list spanning July 2024 → roughly mid-2025.
  • Itinerary planning for the Annapurna Base Camp day-by-day plan (Pokhara → Ghandruk → Chhomrong → Dobhan → ABC → Sinuwa → back), plus Bangkok night markets and Krabi (Rai Lai) — Yahir's adventure creed in receipts form.
  • Captures the original idea-genesis for TikTok style swipe betting app, Brotein / BroMenu, discord betting, AI girlfriends, "TurboTax for immigration", Cam Jipp moonshot launch on Solana, and "App to bet within friend" — the seed list that becomes .
  • The Sam fallout resurfaces as terse end-of-doc TODOs ("call the cops about the Sam situation", "print stalking order", "decide if you are going to court date") — a hard inflection in the romantic arc prequel.
  • Capstone-era OSU + PCC scheduling churn: DBMS, Digital Forensics, Cryptography, Intro to ADS — the academic exit on the way to the Austin thesis materializing in summer 2025.
  • Closes with the SimpleBaby capstone demo script — the OSU group project Yahir pushed through to graduation while already mentally in Austin.

Source

2024 07 04 questions — Apple Note apple_notes_pk: 464, created 2024-07-04, last modified 2025-05-26 (an 11-month rolling capture).

Body

What this note actually is

This is the canonical of late-stage Shanghai study abroad through OSU graduation prep. It opens as a quasi-religious journal — "Why are we here? What do we want to know" — and slides through a layered cake of (a) world-religions cliffsnotes (Christian / Islam / Judaism / Hinduism reduced to one-line essences each), (b) ABC trek itinerary, (c) Thailand market lists (Suan Phlu, Talad Rot Fai Srinakharin, Chinatown, Khlong Toei slum tour, Chatuchak weekend market), and (d) months of TODOs.

China chapter operations

The bulk of the doc is operational China chapter task management:

  • OSU + ECNU coordination — class alignment, midterms, Tang Lao Shi (group leader negotiation), Lucy (dinner planning), Liu Lao Shi (gift)
  • Mandarin study tactics — radicals, ANKI deck buildout, oral test prep, "common conversational phrases", role-play practice
  • Travel logistics inside China — Hangzhou train weekend, Beijing trip with Valeria (Forbidden City tickets, Great Wall shuttle, hotels on both legs), Kunming/Dali OR Shenzhen/Guangzhou exploration debate, Shantou/Chaozhou consideration
  • Networking targets — Hamsa Pay, Tesla Gigafactory Shanghai via Ariel, Sean Michael Floyd, Dorian Dragon, Lachy Groom, Julien Bouteloup, "Shanghai Lawyer"
  • Gift list (going-home) — Dominic communist poster + shoes, Emilio Shanghai Sharks jersey, "cheeky china" gifts for mom/dad/Ann/Wayne/Gramma Liz, liquor for Adam Brogden, Riley hat + "John Cena Mao" shirt, Owen hat, Ethan Hempstead cigs, Kai cigs + communist poster
  • People to keep in touch with — Patricia (coffee → Costco → bar move plan), Valeria visit-to-China negotiation (eventually canned because she's moving into a new apartment and can't leave the animals), Kimiya, Yesenia

The Austin transition (post-China)

Mid-doc the location pivot starts:

  • "Decide what to build with CAM" (the Outpace precursor / thread)
  • "Austin Texas move" appears as a winter-break TODO
  • Personal training in preparation for Austin
  • "Initiate the work minimally, max freedom Austin plan — explicitly get Cam onboard"
  • Final week tasks: graduation cap, Maya invite, buy tickets and solidify Austin in June

This is the Austin thesis materializing as logistics. The "Work minimally, max freedom" framing is the Yahir-specific operating system that becomes the Austin run-up.

The Sam aftermath

Embedded mid-2024 are the Sam collapse aftershocks:

  • "Call the cops about the Sam situation"
  • "Print stalking order — turn in stalking order"
  • "Decide if you are going to court date — talk to mike, reach out to legalaid"

This is a real-world escalation that the prior Sam doc only flagged emotionally. It's the Sam arc transitioning from grief to legal protection. The post breakup conflict concept is concretized here.

The startup-idea seed bed

This doc is the most fertile single source for the idea pile:

  • App to bet within friend — "Simple odds creation. Can also create group bets where others can impact the current odds" → directly becomes swipr / peer wager app concept
  • TurboTax for immigration — "platform / service to help increase talented US immigration. Could be very useful for American economy" → recurring idea across multiple Apple Notes
  • Cam Jipp moonshot launch on Solana — early seed of Cam Jipp crypto collaboration
  • Discord betting, side-quest app (wrld brand precursor — "world side quests, real-world quest that integrates the virtual world"), groq underrated unearthed, AI avatars / personal entity online, cathartic-type jacket, OFFHOURS-type robe

Financial pickle (winter break 2024 → spring 2025)

Pre-Austin financial budgeting moment:

  • Owes Jeff $1914 (rent / advance)
  • Rent $550, has $150 in account
  • Trump card = insurance money (related to the Ford Family Foundation thread? unclear from this doc)
  • Fallback: "tap into a credit line and pay shit that way, then pay it back with a job"

This is the no runway reality that defines Yahir's whole operating posture later — already pricing in zero buffer two semesters before Austin.

Religious/philosophical aphorisms

Early in the doc:

  • "How you talk to oneself matters. Positive and negative"
  • "You know you're great before you're great. Walk with confidence bc it's who you are"
  • "Manifesting things are how you bring them to the top of the stack" — the manifesto voice
  • "Authenticity is the highest frequency"
  • "Everyone makes mistakes, few learn from them" — the Vittorio quote that recurs
  • "Set of heuristics to know when to jump ship and when to reconfigure and fix things" — open question to himself
  • "Inner error correcting voice" — the meta-cognitive reflex

Brotein/SimpleBaby capstone

End-of-doc captures the OSU capstone sprint:

  • Brotein launch tasks (Explore tab, green outline for items, Superwall) — push to App Store officially
  • SimpleBaby demo script for the OSU capstone presentation, with the "database integration was a huge pain point" honesty note
  • BroMenu final figma + boilerplate
  • Perplexity Meeting on the 16th attendance reminder

Catered-event taco math

The Aguirre Tacos / Qdoba / Taqueria Alonzo / La Rockita / El Patron pricing comparison ($420 / $12-per-person / $595, "El Patron - Boycotted info unless you see them irl") — likely graduation party catering research. El Patron is flagged as boycotted.

Connections

  • china chapter — this doc IS the operational backbone of the China chapter
  • the austin thesis — first explicit "Austin Texas move" appears here
  • — seed list for the entire idea cluster
  • cam jipp — co-conspirator named throughout
  • swipr / peer wager app — direct genesis line for friend-betting app
  • brotein / bromenu — capstone-era launch operations
  • simple baby — OSU capstone demo script
  • — exemplar of the genre
  • Sam confrontation — same-period emotional thread
  • the emily arc — pre-Emily relationship void context

Potential Entities (for log.md)

  • annapurna-base-camp-trek — recurring across this and other Nepal-prep docs
  • forbidden-city / great-wall-of-china — Beijing-leg Beijing landmarks
  • tesla-gigafactory-shanghai — networking target
  • hamsa-pay — Shanghai-fintech networking target
  • lachy-groom — VC name dropped as outreach target
  • patricia — recurring Shanghai friend
  • liu-lao-shi / tang-lao-shi — ECNU instructors
  • el-patron-restaurant — Grants Pass restaurant flagged as boycotted
  • aguirre-tacos / taqueria-alonzo — graduation catering options
  • jeff (lender) — needs disambiguation — recurs as "owe Jeff $1914"
  • yesenia — recurring contact
  • kimiya — recurring contact
  • capstone-project — recurring concept (could be promoted)
